twitter_thread: 20 gadgets under $50, $1k spent. Only 5 delivered: 1 saved 2 hours/week, 1 cut food prep by 30%.
Top gadget: $25 USB-C hub with 4 ports, saved me from cable hell.
Avoid $10 wireless earbuds with 10-foot signal loss. Spend $25 for reliable ones.
$20 egg slicer reduced breakfast prep from 20 to 5 minutes. Worth every penny.
A $15 phone stand fixed my video call angles, reducing echo by 90%.
My $30 smart plug automated 80% of lighting, saving $120/yr in energy costs.
What's the best gadget under $50 you've bought this year? #gadgets #gear
